title: FrogiLib
description: A small collection of blocks for my building needs
body:
Just a small collection of building and decorative blocks that I miss in the original game.
The blocks do not have crafting recipes and can only be obtained in creative mode.

The mod currently adds several variants of the deepslate block: column, arch, tombstone, masonry, and smooth. A decorative anvil and a falling smooth stone have also been added.

This library exists so that you don't have duplicate blocks when loading my mods.

You are free to use this library in your projects and modpacks.
